basic_details.job_title: IIPS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Professor of Practice Posts
basic_details.short_information: International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) has released the official Professor of Practice Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the IIPS Professor of Practice Recruitment 2026. Candidates holding a Master's degree in Statistics, Bio-Statistics & Demography, Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related discipline are eligible to apply offline up to 20 July 2026. The age limit has not been specified in the notification. The official notification PDF and application form are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Statistics, Master's degree in Bio-Statistics & Demography, Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related discipline
qualification.details: Professor of Practice in Survey Research: Master's degree in Statistics, and has made significant contributions in the area of Sampling Theory, Large Scale Survey Research and Data Analytics. Desired: M Phil or Ph.D., Experience in curriculum design of sampling theory and data analysis, Teaching Experience of Sampling designs for M. Phil-Ph.D. students, publications in the area of survey research and data analysis. Professor of Practice in Data Science: Master's degree in Statistics, Bio-Statistics & Demography, Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related discipline. Distinguished professional / industry expert in the field of AI, Machine Learning, Data Science, or related domains. Desired: PhD or Master's degree in AI/ML/Data Science, publications in the area of AI/ML/Data Science, Experience delivering corporate training, workshops, hackathons, or bootcamps, Certifications: Google Cloud ML, AWS Machine Learning, TensorFlow Developer, Azure AI Engineer, Power BI.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Professor of Practice in Survey Research
Professor of Practice in Data Science

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Professor of Practice in Survey Research
Professor of Practice in Data Science

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.iipsindia.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.international_institute_for_population_s: Master's degree in Statistics, Master's degree in Bio-Statistics & Demography, Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related discipline

content_sections.heading: IIPS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIPS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIPS Job 2026 Notification PDF

Professor of Practice in Data Science

content_sections.heading: IIPS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Professor of Practice in Survey Research: Master's degree in Statistics, and has made significant contributions in the area of Sampling Theory, Large Scale Survey Research and Data Analytics. Desired: M Phil or Ph.D., Experience in curriculum design of sampling theory and data analysis, Teaching Experience of Sampling designs for M. Phil-Ph.D. students, publications in the area of survey research and data analysis. Professor of Practice in Data Science: Master's degree in Statistics, Bio-Statistics & Demography, Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related discipline. Distinguished professional / industry expert in the field of AI, Machine Learning, Data Science, or related domains. Desired: PhD or Master's degree in AI/ML/Data Science, publications in the area of AI/ML/Data Science, Experience delivering corporate training, workshops, hackathons, or bootcamps, Certifications: Google Cloud ML, AWS Machine Learning, TensorFlow Developer, Azure AI Engineer, Power BI.

rows.event: Last Date of receipt of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.iipsindia.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIPS Professor of Practice posts?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the IIPS Professor of Practice posts is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the institute by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Professor of Practice position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Professor of Practice position at the International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Professor of Practice role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Professor of Practice role will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 150000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Statistics, Bio-Statistics & Demography, Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related discipline, with specific requirements for each specialization.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIPS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Professor of Practice posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Professor of Practice posts will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS), which is www.iipsindia.ac.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as per the notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIPS?
faq.answer: The official website of the International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) is www.iipsindia.ac.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.
